messages.name: Junior Amorim Latam Coder 1232
messages.text:
1. FaqSection.js uses useState(activeTab) and onClick={() => toggleTab(...)},  there is no data-bs-toggle="tab" anywhere.
2. I believe that Jest + Babel + react test library is the correct for these taks.
3. Per the guidelines and common errors, We need to still the tests config in the test_patch

messages.name: Junior Amorim Latam Coder 1232
messages.text: Because of this, I'm ineligible in the project.

messages.name: Tomas Ruiz QM
messages.text: Hello, I think we already talked this morning in the war room. Did you receive the invitation link?

messages.name: Tomas Ruiz QM
messages.text: Hi! I understand the concern, but just to clarify, this decision was not based on one single low-quality feedback. It was based on the overall quality trend across your reviewed work. For example, around 41% of your reviewed tasks are currently scored as 3, which shows that the work has not been consistently meeting the project quality bar. Because of that overall pattern, the STO believes you may be a better fit for another project
